visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a computer monitor displaying technical data. The screen is filled with white text on a black background. Prominently displayed is the title "RESUME SCAN ON" in blue. Below this, various lines of information are listed, including "GSM900 USER ---- 06523," "EGSM900 USER --- 00018," and "LOWER RANGE RECEIVER---- 267." Other data points like "HITS / FREQUENCY" and coordinates are also visible. The camera remains static, holding the shot on the data-filled screen. The audio opens with a low, rhythmic, and slightly tense electronic beat, creating a mood of suspense and technological surveillance. A male voice speaks in a calm, analytical tone, as if reporting data from a computer system. His delivery is steady and focused, conveying a sense of urgency and importance. "这局现在有6500多个手机电话接通了，光是山东街12个..." (This area now has more than 6,500 mobile phone calls connected. Just in Shandong Street, 12...).
